title: Shared Lootr
description: Make Lootr containers share one stored inventory while keeping Lootr's opened marker behavior.
body:
# Shared Lootr

**Shared Lootr keeps Lootr's chest markers, but makes the contents shared.**

Shared Lootr is a small addon for [Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr). It is for modpacks and servers that want one shared loot pool per Lootr container while keeping Lootr's opened/unopened visual feedback.

## What it does

- Makes each Lootr container use one shared stored inventory.
- Preserves Lootr's container conversion, loot generation, menus, lid behavior, opener tracking, and update packets.
- Treats Lootr's opened state as a global opened marker for client visual feedback.

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.1
- NeoForge
- Lootr `1.21.1-1.11.37.120` or a compatible 1.21.1 build

## Notes

This mod intentionally does not add new chest blocks or a separate storage system. It only changes the point where Lootr chooses which saved inventory to open.
